title: Timeline zoom on the Gantt views
what: Zoom controls on every Gantt timeline let you expand or condense how many days are visible — zoom in for a tight look at a busy week, zoom out to see the whole schedule.
where: Any Gantt timeline — an edit's Timeline tab, the project Gantt share link, or the Full Pipeline view. Controls sit at the top right of the chart.
how: Click + to zoom in (fewer days, more detail) or − to zoom out (more days visible).
Click Fit to snap back to the full schedule.

title: Admin role preview (View as…)
what: Admins can preview the entire platform exactly as any other role sees it — Producer, Finance, Crew, Agency, or Client — without signing out. Tiles, pages, and menus all follow the previewed role.
where: Hub header, next to the Backup button: the 'View as…' dropdown. A purple banner at the top of every page shows which role you're previewing.
how: On the hub, open the 'View as…' dropdown in the top-right header.
Pick a role — the platform immediately re-renders as that role would see it.
Browse anywhere; the purple 'Previewing as …' banner stays at the top.
Click Exit Preview on the banner (or reset the dropdown) to return to your admin view.
